assertion_results.text: Step 7 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Case A shows two tasks for stream rhtpa-2.2. Task 1 (upstream backport) uses labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] and linkage type: "Depend" to TC-8020. Task 2 (downstream propagation) uses the same labels and also has a "Depend" link to TC-8020. cross-stream.md comparison table confirms Case A uses labels ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"] and "Depend" link type.

assertion_results.text: Step 7 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md states: 'Stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected: tokio 1.40.0 is below the fix threshold of 1.42.0' and 'No sibling Vulnerability issues found for CVE-2026-55123 in stream rhtpa-2.1. No CVE Jira exists for the rhtpa-2.1 stream. This triggers Case B (cross-stream proactive remediation) for stream rhtpa-2.1.' remediation.md Case B section creates Task 3 (upstream backport preemptive for rhtpa-2.1) and Task 4 (downstream propagation preemptive for rhtpa-2.1).

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 specifies labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"] and Task 4 specifies the same labels. cross-stream.md confirms: Case B Preemptive labels are ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"].

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 linkage: 'type: "Related"' with comment 'Linkage (Related, not Depend)'. Task 4 linkage to TC-8020: 'type: "Related"'. cross-stream.md explicitly states: 'Link to TC-8020: "Related" (not "Depend" -- because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream)' for both preemptive tasks.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 description includes: '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream\n> impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2).' Task 4 description includes the same prefix. cross-stream.md confirms: 'Description prefix: Preemptive remediation note citing TC-8020 and originating stream rhtpa-2.2'.
